source: Arlo Confluence: VMB4540 (Osprey BS / Pro3 SmartHub), Arlo Cost-Down Base Station Platform (VMB3500/VMB4500/VMB4540), Local SSH access to Low Cost Gen3 Base Station, QCA WiFi commands, Loading images and initial board configuration, ACSD information for Basestations.
notes: OpenWrt + QCA4531 SmartHub firmware (vzdaemon/vzwatchdog/xagent). SSH: root@<ip>, password 'ngbase' (dev/qa) or 'NX9PvLX2L3YvhjBjVLi68yBA8' (staging/ftrial/production). Enable SSH on prod by long-pressing sync button 11s. Categories use the canonical sidebar taxonomy (firmware/device/kv/logs/network/mfg) so every block gets proper section styling.

commands.name: update_url
commands.description: Set vz_update_url in /tmp/media/nand/config/arlo/env/vzdaemon.env, then check_configs --backup. The 'update url' abstract reboots afterwards.
commands.shell: sh -c 'FILE=/tmp/media/nand/config/arlo/env/vzdaemon.env; [ -f "$FILE" ] || { echo "ERR: $FILE not found" >&2; exit 1; }; if grep -q "^vz_update_url=" "$FILE"; then sed -i "s|^vz_update_url=.*|vz_update_url=$1|" "$FILE"; else printf "\nvz_update_url=%s\n" "$1" >> "$FILE"; fi && grep "^vz_update_url=" "$FILE" && check_configs --backup' _

commands.name: manual_ota
commands.description: Install firmware update from URL, toggle active partition and reboot (fwupgrade)

commands.name: vzdaemon_version
commands.description: Arlo firmware version reported by vzdaemon

commands.name: factory_reset
commands.description: Stop services, wipe overlay + user partitions, reboot (documented Osprey reset sequence)
commands.syntax: killall vzdaemon vzwatchdog xagent; umount -f /overlay; mtd erase rootfs_data; umount -f /tmp/media/nand; mtd erase user; reboot
commands.shell: killall vzdaemon vzwatchdog xagent; umount -f /overlay; mtd erase rootfs_data; umount -f /tmp/media/nand; mtd erase user; reboot

commands.name: get_current_environment
commands.description: Osprey SmartHub has no documented single-key stage read; check u-boot env manually
commands.unsupported_message: get_current_environment has no documented one-liner on Osprey SmartHub; inspect fw_printenv / NVRAM manually.

commands.name: refresh_update_rules
commands.description: No arlocmd-style update rule refresh on this hub
commands.unsupported_message: refresh_update_rules is not defined on Osprey SmartHub.

commands.name: set_kv_write
commands.description: Set NVRAM key (pair with kv_commit to persist)

commands.name: kv_commit
commands.description: Commit pending NVRAM changes to flash

commands.name: tail_system_log
commands.description: Tail the /tmp/system-log file directly (alt. to logread)

commands.name: get_wifi_status
commands.description: Wireless interface summary (SSID, channel, signal, bitrate)

commands.name: acsd_scan
commands.description: Trigger manual ACSD channel scan (VMB3500/VMB4500/VMB4540 path)

commands.name: acsd_scan_vzcmd
commands.description: Trigger ACSD scan via vzdaemon so paired cameras are notified

commands.name: connect_wifi
commands.description: Hub is a WiFi AP for paired cameras — connecting the hub to an upstream WiFi is not a supported workflow
commands.unsupported_message: Osprey SmartHub runs as a WiFi AP (hostapd) for paired cameras; joining upstream WiFi as a station is not a supported workflow from this tool.

commands.name: burnsn
commands.description: MFG: burn serial number (factory provisioning only)

commands.name: burnethermac
commands.description: MFG: burn ethernet MAC (factory provisioning only)
